'''tadate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:paganishly|paganishly]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-d-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:paganishly|paganishly]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| tadate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:tadate|tadate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:tadatesher|tadatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tadatesherĂ«m|tadatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:tadatero|tadatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:tadateshĂ«|tadateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tadateshĂ«m|tadateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokitadatero|gokitadatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokitadateshĂ«|gokitadateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitadateshĂ«m|gokitadateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gotadankerom|gotadankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotadankeshĂ«|gotadankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotadankeshĂ«m|gotadankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gotadankeya|gotadankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:tadaterom|tadaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tadatemu|tadatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:tadateya|tadateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokitadaterom|gokitadaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitadatemu|gokitadatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokitadateya|gokitadateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:tadadate|tadadate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:tadadatesher|tadadatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tadadatesherĂ«m|tadadatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:tadadatero|tadadatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:tadadateshĂ«|tadadateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tadadateshĂ«m|tadadateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokitadadatero|gokitadadatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokitadadateshĂ«|gokitadadateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitadadateshĂ«m|gokitadadateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gotadadankerom|gotadadankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotadadankeshĂ«|gotadadankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotadadankeshĂ«m|gotadadankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gotadadankeya|gotadadankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:tadadaterom|tadadaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tadadatemu|tadadatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:tadadateya|tadadateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokitadadaterom|gokitadadaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitadadatemu|gokitadadatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokitadadateya|gokitadadateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:tĂŠdĂŠte|tĂŠdĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:tĂŠdĂŠtesher|tĂŠdĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tĂŠdĂŠtesherĂ«m|tĂŠdĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:tĂŠdĂŠtero|tĂŠdĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:tĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«|tĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«m|tĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokitĂŠdĂŠtero|gokitĂŠdĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokitĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«|gokitĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«m|gokitĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gotĂŠdĂŠnkerom|gotĂŠdĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotĂŠdĂŠnkeshĂ«|gotĂŠdĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotĂŠdĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gotĂŠdĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gotĂŠdĂŠnkeya|gotĂŠdĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:tĂŠdĂŠterom|tĂŠdĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tĂŠdĂŠtemu|tĂŠdĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:tĂŠdĂŠteya|tĂŠdĂŠteya]]
|-

|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitĂŠdĂŠtemu|gokitĂŠdĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokitĂŠdĂŠteya|gokitĂŠdĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:tafdafte|tafdafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:tafdaftesher|tafdaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tafdaftesherĂ«m|tafdaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:tafdaftero|tafdaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:tafdafteshĂ«|tafdafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tafdafteshĂ«m|tafdafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokitafdaftero|gokitafdaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokitafdafteshĂ«|gokitafdafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitafdafteshĂ«m|gokitafdafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gotafdafnkerom|gotafdafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotafdafnkeshĂ«|gotafdafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotafdafnkeshĂ«m|gotafdafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gotafdafnkeya|gotafdafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:tafdafterom|tafdafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tafdaftemu|tafdaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:tafdafteya|tafdafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokitafdafterom|gokitafdafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitafdaftemu|gokitafdaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokitafdafteya|gokitafdafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
